remarks: Experience the Ultimate in Urban Coastal Living! Nestled in the heart of historic downtown SoNo within the highly sought-after Haviland Arms Complex, this stunning studio apartment offers the perfect blend of vibrant city energy and coastal relaxation. The bright and spacious layout boasts hardwood flooring throughout, creating an inviting space that adapts effortlessly to your lifestyle. Step outside your door to immerse yourself in Norwalk's premier cultural hub, surrounded by eclectic specialty shops, gourmet restaurants, and a bustling nightlife. Commuting is an absolute breeze with the Metro-North train station and local transit just moments away, while Norwalk's beautiful beaches and waterfront parks are practically in your backyard. Don't miss this incredible opportunity to own a piece of SoNo's unmatched charm!
